v01.description: The final conjunct was changed from 'and Encounter."No live vaccine was administered in the last 4 weeks"' to 'or ...', making MCV2 due too broadly.

v02.define: Client is not due for second dose of measles-containing vaccine (MCV2)
v02.description: The required AND between MCV1 administered and age less than 15 months was changed to OR.

v03.description: The due-for-MCV1 row should require no live vaccine in the last 4 weeks, but references live vaccine was administered instead.

v04.description: The MCV2 due row should require Encounter."MCV1 was administered", but references Encounter."MCV2 was administered".

v05.description: The ongoing-transmission schedule requires age >= 9 months for MCV1, but the variant uses age >= 12 months.

v06.define: Client is not due for MCV2
v06.description: The MCV2 live-vaccine not-due row should require age >= 15 months, but the variant uses age >= 12 months.

v07.define: Client is not due for MCV2
v07.description: The live-vaccine precondition Encounter."Live vaccine was administered in the last 4 weeks" is missing from the MCV2 not-due row.

v08.define: Client is not due for MCV2
v08.description: The age precondition Encounter."Client's age is more than or equal to 15 months" is missing from the MCV2 not-due row.

v09.description: The Measles12.3 test comparison for Guidance was changed from '=' to '!='.

v10.description: The Measles11.2 test condition was changed from Patient.id = 'Measles11.2' to Patient.id != 'Measles11.2'.

v11.define: Client is not due for second dose of measles-containing vaccine (MCV2) Guidance
v11.description: The MCV2 age-not-due guidance text was swapped with the measles primary series complete guidance text.

v12.define: Client is not due for MCV1 Guidance
v12.description: The MCV1 live-vaccine not-due guidance text was swapped with the measles primary series complete guidance text.
